title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #13, Perospero, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oi, brook! Chopper! Are you guys awake?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we make it out of here, I can't have you two die on-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sighted straw hats off the south- western coast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: minister Amanda here. I'll corral them in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ummm... so three barrels of cola, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's bad, Nami! The ship's trapped in candy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the heck is with this candy?! Now we can't use the coup de burst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Turn Brook and Chopper back to normal, candy-guy!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Will Mama turn them into pulp first?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Or will the cannons sink them first?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, do you have any idea what my bounty is? 700 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: An idiot like you could never-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh?! What are you up to over there, Pedro?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how important it is to ensure that Luffy and his friends live and get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This should put an end to your magic, no?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BOMBS? Not funny. What are you think- ing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This was to be my last voyage!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 41 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
